_min_chars_note: Per-entity minimum match length. Drops short-token false positives from low-precision built-in recognizers (e.g. US_DRIVER_LICENSE matching a 3-char acronym). A real identifier of that class is longer; tune conservatively.
_note: Tiered PII policy for a public-figure research domain. PERSON / public ORG / public LOCATION are legitimate content (redact + record); contact/identity/secret PII hard-fails; an allowed entity in a sensitive context escalates to needs_review. A mesh operator may override this file at .caterpillar/guardrails/oracle/pii.json; the workflow prefers that path when present. config_sha256 in the rail report pins whichever config ran.
